title: orchis biflora
intro: Orchis biflora, also known as the two-flowered orchid, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Orchis biflora include the potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a diuretic to aid in the treatment of kidney and urinary problems. In traditional herbal preparations, Orchis biflora is often combined with other herbs and used in teas, decoctions, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
